PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?numRaces WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P31 wd:Q108861375 ; wdt:P1346 wd:Q9673 ; wdt:P585 ?year ; wdt:P1350 ?numRaces .
  FILTER(?year > "2015-12-31" ^^ xsd:date)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?numRaces)
LIMIT 1
